# API Reference {#sec-api-reference}

The manual should not duplicate every class signature. API details should be generated from Doxygen comments in the IPPL source tree.

## Planned integration

1. Build Doxygen from `Doxyfile.api`.
2. Publish the generated API pages alongside the Quarto manual or link to the existing hosted Doxygen site.
3. Add stable links from each manual chapter to the relevant class pages.

Local API build:

```bash
IPPL_SOURCE_DIR=/Users/adelmann/git/ippl doxygen Doxyfile.api
```

For GitHub Pages, the recommended structure is to render the Quarto manual to `docs/` and place generated Doxygen HTML under `docs/api/`. Manual pages can then link to API pages with stable relative paths such as `api/classippl_1_1Field.html` once the Doxygen output naming is confirmed.

Rendered local entry point: [Doxygen API index](../../api/index.html).

The generated class index is the canonical inventory: [Doxygen class list](../../api/annotated.html). A local comparison against the IPPL `src/` tree showed that `Inform` and several other public-facing runtime, boundary-condition, solver, and region classes were generated by Doxygen but not yet linked from this chapter. The table below is therefore a curated entry-point map, not the full class inventory.

## Link policy

The manual should link to API pages for signatures and overloads, while keeping conceptual explanations in Quarto. This avoids stale duplicated declarations.

| Manual content | API reference content |
|---|---|
| Workflow, assumptions, invariants, examples. | Constructors, method signatures, template parameters. |
| Backend selection and parameter meaning. | Exact overloads and default values. |
| Numerical problem statement and expected diagnostics. | Member variables only when public or intentionally exposed. |
| Developer extension rules. | Public and protected interfaces. |

## Key entry points

| Header | Manual chapter | API page |
|---|---|---|
| `Ippl.h` | @sec-getting-started | [source](../../api/Ippl_8h_source.html) |
| `Utility/Inform.h` | @sec-getting-started, @sec-communication | [`Inform`](../../api/classInform.html) |
| `Utility/IpplInfo.h` | @sec-getting-started | [source](../../api/IpplInfo_8h_source.html) |
| `Utility/IpplException.h` | @sec-developer-guide | [`IpplException`](../../api/classIpplException.html) |
| `Utility/IpplTimings.h` | @sec-examples, @sec-performance-portability | [`IpplTimings`](../../api/classIpplTimings.html) |
| `Index/Index.h`, `Index/NDIndex.h` | @sec-core-concepts | [`Index`](../../api/classippl_1_1Index.html), [`NDIndex`](../../api/classippl_1_1NDIndex.html) |
| `Region/NDRegion.h`, `Region/PRegion.h` | @sec-core-concepts, @sec-particles | [`NDRegion`](../../api/classippl_1_1NDRegion.html), [`PRegion`](../../api/classippl_1_1PRegion.html) |
| `Meshes/UniformCartesian.h` | @sec-core-concepts, @sec-fields | [`UniformCartesian`](../../api/classippl_1_1UniformCartesian.html) |
| `Field/Field.h`, `Field/BareField.h` | @sec-fields | [`Field`](../../api/classippl_1_1Field.html), [`BareField`](../../api/classippl_1_1BareField.html) |
| `Field/BConds.h`, `Field/BcTypes.h` | @sec-fields | [`BConds`](../../api/classippl_1_1BConds.html), [`PeriodicFace`](../../api/classippl_1_1PeriodicFace.html), [`ConstantFace`](../../api/classippl_1_1ConstantFace.html), [`ZeroFace`](../../api/classippl_1_1ZeroFace.html), [`ExtrapolateFace`](../../api/classippl_1_1ExtrapolateFace.html), [`NoBcFace`](../../api/classippl_1_1NoBcFace.html) |
| `FieldLayout/FieldLayout.h` | @sec-fields | [`FieldLayout`](../../api/classippl_1_1FieldLayout.html) |
| `Particle/ParticleBase.h` | @sec-particles | [`ParticleBase`](../../api/classippl_1_1ParticleBase.html) |
| `Particle/ParticleAttrib.h` | @sec-particles | [`ParticleAttrib`](../../api/classippl_1_1ParticleAttrib.html) |
| `Particle/ParticleSpatialLayout.h`, `Particle/ParticleSpatialOverlapLayout.h` | @sec-particles | [`ParticleSpatialLayout`](../../api/classippl_1_1ParticleSpatialLayout.html), [`ParticleSpatialOverlapLayout`](../../api/classippl_1_1ParticleSpatialOverlapLayout.html) |
| `Interpolation/CIC.h` | @sec-particle-mesh | [source](../../api/CIC_8h_source.html) |
| `FFT/FFT.h` | @sec-fft | [`FFT`](../../api/classippl_1_1FFT.html) |
| `PoissonSolvers/Poisson.h` | @sec-poisson-solvers | [`Poisson`](../../api/classippl_1_1Poisson.html) |
| `PoissonSolvers/PoissonCG.h` | @sec-poisson-solvers | [`PoissonCG`](../../api/classippl_1_1PoissonCG.html) |
| `PoissonSolvers/FFTPeriodicPoissonSolver.h` | @sec-poisson-solvers | [`FFTPeriodicPoissonSolver`](../../api/classippl_1_1FFTPeriodicPoissonSolver.html) |
| `PoissonSolvers/FFTOpenPoissonSolver.h` | @sec-poisson-solvers | [`FFTOpenPoissonSolver`](../../api/classippl_1_1FFTOpenPoissonSolver.html) |
| `PoissonSolvers/FFTTruncatedGreenPeriodicPoissonSolver.h` | @sec-poisson-solvers | [`FFTTruncatedGreenPeriodicPoissonSolver`](../../api/classippl_1_1FFTTruncatedGreenPeriodicPoissonSolver.html) |
| `PoissonSolvers/FEMPoissonSolver.h`, `PoissonSolvers/PreconditionedFEMPoissonSolver.h` | @sec-poisson-solvers, @sec-fem | [`FEMPoissonSolver`](../../api/classippl_1_1FEMPoissonSolver.html), [`PreconditionedFEMPoissonSolver`](../../api/classippl_1_1PreconditionedFEMPoissonSolver.html) |
| `MaxwellSolvers/Maxwell.h` | @sec-maxwell-solvers | [`Maxwell`](../../api/classippl_1_1Maxwell.html) |
| `MaxwellSolvers/FDTDSolverBase.h`, `MaxwellSolvers/StandardFDTDSolver.h`, `MaxwellSolvers/NonStandardFDTDSolver.h` | @sec-maxwell-solvers | [`FDTDSolverBase`](../../api/classippl_1_1FDTDSolverBase.html), [`StandardFDTDSolver`](../../api/classippl_1_1StandardFDTDSolver.html), [`NonStandardFDTDSolver`](../../api/classippl_1_1NonStandardFDTDSolver.html) |
| `MaxwellSolvers/FEMMaxwellDiffusionSolver.h` | @sec-maxwell-solvers, @sec-fem | [`FEMMaxwellDiffusionSolver`](../../api/classippl_1_1FEMMaxwellDiffusionSolver.html) |
| `FEM/FiniteElementSpace.h` | @sec-fem | [`FiniteElementSpace`](../../api/classippl_1_1FiniteElementSpace.html) |
| `FEM/LagrangeSpace.h`, `FEM/NedelecSpace.h` | @sec-fem | [`LagrangeSpace`](../../api/classippl_1_1LagrangeSpace.html), [`NedelecSpace`](../../api/classippl_1_1NedelecSpace.html) |
| `Communicate/Communicator.h` | @sec-communication | [`Communicator`](../../api/classippl_1_1mpi_1_1Communicator.html) |
| `Utility/ParameterList.h` | @sec-core-concepts, @sec-poisson-solvers | [`ParameterList`](../../api/classippl_1_1ParameterList.html) |
